{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/186532546?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Ryu7zz", "id": 186532546, "login": "Ryu7zz", "node_id": "U_kgDOCx5Cwg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryu7zz", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41182", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-359", "name": "Exposure of Private Personal Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-532", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File"}], "description": "## Summary

The LangSmith SDK's output redaction controls (hideOutputs in JS, hide_outputs in Python) do not apply to streaming token events. When an LLM run produces streaming output, each chunk is recorded as a new_token event containing the raw token value. These events bypass the redaction pipeline entirely — prepareRunCreateOrUpdateInputs (JS) and _hide_run_outputs (Python) only process the inputs and outputs fields on a run, never the events array. As a result, applications relying on output redaction to prevent sensitive LLM output from being stored in LangSmith will still leak the full streamed content via run events.

## Details

**Both JS and Python SDKs are affected.** The same pattern exists in both:

- **JS SDK**: `traceable.ts:997-1003` and `traceable.ts:1044-1050`
- **Python SDK**: `run_helpers.py:1924` and `run_helpers.py:1996`

In both SDKs, `new_token` events with raw `kwargs.token` values are added during streaming, and the redaction pipeline (`hideOutputs` in JS, `hide_outputs` in Python) only processes `inputs`/`outputs` — never `events`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00214, "percentile": 0.11638}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T01:20:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41182"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T02:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T01:20:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/langchain-ai/langsmith-sdk/security/advisories/GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41182", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/langchain-ai/langsmith-sdk/security-advisories/GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/langchain-ai/langsmith-sdk", "summary": "LangSmith SDK: Streaming token events bypass output redaction", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:52:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rr7j-v2q5-chgv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.5.19", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "langsmith"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.5.18"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.7.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "langsmith"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.7.30"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: LangSmith SDK: Streaming token events bypass output redaction
